🏥 Lexington Medical

HPB/Surgical Oncology Surgeon Intelligence Platform

📊 Database: 514 HPB / Surgical Oncology Surgeons Nationwide

✓ 514 Priority Surgeons (ALL TARGETS): Identified using Definitive Healthcare (DH) estimated Upper GI work RVUs with a minimum threshold of 150 RVUs and ≥15% Upper GI share of total volume. These are surgeons performing liver resections, pancreas resections, esophagectomies, and splenectomies — key procedures for AEON powered stapler adoption.
  • Tier A — High Volume · 44 surgeons — DH 1,000+ Upper GI RVUs (≈ 26+ cases/yr)
  • Tier B — Moderate Volume · 134 surgeons — DH 400–999 Upper GI RVUs (≈ 11–26 cases/yr)
  • Tier C — Lower Volume · 300 surgeons — DH 150–399 Upper GI RVUs (≈ 4–10 cases/yr)
  • SFDC-Sourced · 36 surgeons — Added from Salesforce CRM (existing Lexington contacts not in DH dataset)
📋 Data Sources: DH values are per-surgeon estimated work RVUs (Relative Value Units) from Definitive Healthcare — not surgical case counts. Approximately 38 RVUs ≈ 1 HPB case. DH Financial Potential = RVU Score × $221/RVU. An additional 36 surgeons were added from SFDC (not in DH). SFDC data provides Lexington relationship context for 50 known HPB/Surgical Oncology contacts. The DH Contact tab shows contact info and Upper GI volume score.
